final:
module d_flip_flop(
    input clk,
    input rst,
    input [3:0] d,
    output reg [3:0] q
);
      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge rst or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (rst) begin
            q <= 4'b0000;
        end else begin
            q <= d;
        end
    end
endmodule
